name: Sports Factory of the Lehigh Valley
about: Sports Factory of the Lehigh Valley is a premier sports and entertainment complex spanning 22,000 sq. ft. The facility offers a comprehensive range of services, including indoor high-tech golf simulation, sport-specific training, athletic events, turf rentals, and birthday parties. It is a multipurpose venue designed to cater to diverse activities, from individual practice to group events, all within a state-of-the-art environment. The venue features an on-site restaurant, Casa Di Italia, and has partnered with HiJinx Brewing Co and All Star Grill to provide food and beverage options, creating an all-in-one destination for sports and entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor high-tech golf simulator for year-round practice
On-site food and beverage options available
Multipurpose facility allows for combined activities and events
State-of-the-art technology for refining golf skills

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant, Casa Di Italia, available for ordering.

faq.answer: The content does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best personal experience.

faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant, Casa Di Italia, and food/drink partnerships. BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned, so it is best to check their website or contact them directly.

faq.answer: The content does not provide a specific time estimate for 18 holes. Simulator play time can vary, so it's recommended to inquire directly with the venue.

faq.answer: Yes, Sports Factory of the Lehigh Valley is kid-friendly. They offer birthday parties, summer camps, and organized sports activities for children.
